meta_title: For Freelancers: Antigravity project template to Solve stuck with basic apps (Intermediate Resource Page)
meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome stuck with basic apps. A Intermediate-level Resource Page using Antigravity and Claude Code.
h2_structure: The Problem: stuck with basic apps

content.seo_title: Antigravity Template: Scale Your Freelance AI Projects
content.seo_description: Break past basic app limitations with the Antigravity project template. A high-efficiency workflow for intermediate developers using Claude Code.
content.answer_block: Stop building static CRUD apps that clients outgrow in weeks. The Antigravity project template integrates modular architecture with Claude Code, allowing you to ship production-ready, AI-native applications at 3x the speed. Move from generic prototypes to scalable, high-impact enterprise solutions that justify premium freelance rates and retain long-term clients.
content.intro:
You know the feeling: you've delivered the MVP, the client is happy, but the codebase is a fragile house of cards. You are stuck in a loop of basic, linear apps that lack the sophistication your portfolio demands. Every new feature request feels like a looming technical debt avalanche, and your velocity is stalled by repetitive boilerplate.

It is time to abandon the amateur approach. The Antigravity project template isn't just a starter kit; it is an architectural paradigm shift designed for the modern AI engineer. By combining this robust framework with the analytical power of Claude Code, you can automate your boilerplate and focus strictly on high-value logic, transforming your freelance output from 'disposable' to 'foundational'.

steps.title: Initialize the Antigravity Foundation
steps.description: Establish the base directory structure that forces modularity and type-safety from the first commit.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Initialize a new enterprise-grade project using the Antigravity core template with TypeScript, Zod validation, and modular service-layer architecture.

steps.title: Configure AI-Driven Data Schemas
steps.description: Use the template's built-in schema generator to define your database models before writing a single line of business logic.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate Zod schemas and Prisma models for a multi-tenant SaaS application with user roles, subscription tiers, and audit logging.

steps.title: Implement Modular Service Layers
steps.description: Decouple your business logic from the API routes to ensure your code remains testable and maintainable.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a service layer for user authentication and billing, ensuring strict separation of concerns from the API transport layer.

steps.title: Automate Endpoint Generation
steps.description: Leverage the template's CLI tools to map your services to REST or tRPC endpoints instantly.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Expose the newly created service layer as a type-safe tRPC router endpoint with full error handling.

steps.title: Stress Test with Claude Code
steps.description: Run automated architectural reviews to identify potential bottlenecks before the client sees the code.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the codebase for performance bottlenecks, security vulnerabilities, and adherence to the Antigravity architectural guidelines.

pro_tips: Always use Zod for runtime validation at the boundary; it prevents 90% of production runtime exceptions in AI apps.
Treat your prompts like unit tests—if a prompt fails to produce the expected output, refactor the prompt, don't just patch the code.
Implement 'Feature Flags' early using the template's config system to allow client A/B testing without redeploying the entire stack.
Use Claude Code to generate 'Documentation-as-Code' by pointing it to your service layer, ensuring your README stays synced with logic.
Keep your service functions under 50 lines; if they grow longer, use the Antigravity CLI to trigger a refactor into sub-modules.
content.next_steps: Deploy your first modular component to a staging environment using the Antigravity CI/CD pipeline and share your results in the community Discord for peer review.
content.conversion_block: Stop struggling with fragile code and start delivering professional-grade software that clients pay a premium for. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
